mentions.note: CEO Kreiz bought $1M stock post-earnings; 2026 is inflection year: Masters of the Universe film, $150M digital games invest, IP-driven entertainment. 3–6% growth guidance, acceleration into 2027. Strong buyback ($1.5B plan), tariffs mitigated.
Stock down 25%, CEO Ynon Kreiz buying shares, 11x earnings; bottoming here; should be bought at these levels.
